description: Archive store for EIT_Incidents items closed more than 12 months ago. Populated by the EIT Monthly Archive Power Automate flow. Read-only after population — do not edit items in this list manually.

columns.name: Title
columns.notes: Incident title — copied from EIT_Incidents.Title

columns.name: ItemID
columns.notes: EIT-NNN identifier — copied from EIT_Incidents.ItemID

columns.name: Owner
columns.notes: Incident owner — copied from EIT_Incidents.Owner

columns.name: Domain
columns.notes: Enterprise domain — copied from EIT_Incidents.Domain

columns.name: Priority
columns.notes: Incident priority — copied from EIT_Incidents.Priority

columns.name: IncidentType
columns.notes: Incident type — copied from EIT_Incidents.IncidentType

columns.name: Severity
columns.notes: Severity at time of closure — copied from EIT_Incidents.Severity

columns.name: Status
columns.notes: Always Closed for archived incidents

columns.name: EscalationThreshold
columns.notes: Final escalation level — copied from EIT_Incidents.EscalationThreshold

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.notes: Origin system — copied from EIT_Incidents.SourceSystem

columns.name: ConfidentialityLevel
columns.notes: Confidentiality classification — copied from EIT_Incidents.ConfidentialityLevel

columns.name: RelatedItemIDs
columns.notes: Cross-reference to source system tickets (ServiceNow, iSight) — copied from EIT_Incidents.RelatedItemIDs

columns.name: DateRaised
columns.notes: Original incident raise date — copied from EIT_Incidents.DateRaised

columns.name: LastUpdated
columns.notes: Date of last update before archiving — copied from EIT_Incidents.LastUpdated

columns.name: DateContained
columns.notes: Date incident was contained (if applicable) — copied from EIT_Incidents.DateContained

columns.name: NextAction
columns.notes: Final next action / resolution notes — copied from EIT_Incidents.NextAction

columns.name: DaysSinceUpdate
columns.notes: Days since last update at time of archiving — copied from EIT_Incidents.DaysSinceUpdate

columns.name: StalenessFlag
columns.notes: Staleness status at time of archiving — copied from EIT_Incidents.StalenessFlag

columns.name: PrivilegedAndConfidential
columns.notes: P&C flag — copied from EIT_Incidents.PrivilegedAndConfidential. IMPORTANT: Apply item-level permissions to P&C archived items as you would for the live list. See EIT-Access-Control-Guide.md.

columns.name: ArchivedDate
columns.notes: Date this item was archived by the EIT Monthly Archive flow. Set to utcNow() at time of archive. NET NEW — not present in EIT_Incidents.

listSettings.notes: Disable versioning to reduce storage. Item-level permissions required for any P&C items copied from EIT_Incidents. The EIT Monthly Archive flow must apply the same item-level permission restrictions to P&C archived items as were applied in the source list.

views.name: Archive Audit
views.notes: Useful for regulatory reporting — shows full incident timeline from raise to archive

permissions.notes: Members can view archived incidents for reference. Write access not required — the archive is read-only for users.

accessControl.notes: EIT Viewers are NOT granted access to the archive list by default. Only EIT Members and Owners can view archived incidents. P&C archived items require individual item-level permissions applied at the time of archiving.
